title: PI Manual – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
PI Manual
When publish your research work in academic journals, please check this website about journals on the ‘Early Warning List’ [released by National Science Library, Chinese Academy of Sciences] and consider avoiding publishing in these journals. Feel free to contact RSO if you have any questions about this.
In order to see all the policies, please log in with your NetID.
